bird.summary: The streaked dacnis (Xenodacnis petersi) is a small neotropical passerine bird found in Peru. It is found in Andean montane scrub forests f…

relations.evidence: |year=2017 |amends=2016 |title=Xenodacnis petersi |volume=2017 |article-number=e.T103840020A119560069 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2017-3.RLTS.T103840020A119560069.en |access-date=26 July 2023}} | genus = Xenodacnis | species = petersi | authority = Bond, J & Meyer de Schauensee, 1939 | range_map = }} The streaked dacnis (Xenodacnis petersi) is a small neotropical passerine bird found in Peru
